headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum Slide, XRP, Dogecoin Steady As Iran War Spooks Investors: Popular Chartist Says This Indicator Acting As 'Ceiling' For BTC Price
summary: Leading cryptocurrencies slid alongside stock futures and commodities Sunday overnight as the ongoing Middle East conflict kept investors on edge.

headline: Coinbase Global Conference: CFO Haas touts “Everything Exchange” push amid volatility, regulation talks
summary: Coinbase Global (NASDAQ:COIN) executives and industry partners discussed crypto market dynamics, U.S. regulation, and the company’s push to expand beyond spot crypto trading during a recent event featuring Coinbase CFO Alesia Haas and Morgan Stanley’s Global Head of Fintech, Jigar Patel. Crypto vol

headline: Brian Armstrong Hunted For Fixes When His Crypto Company Went Flat Post-Launch: He Found Them By Simply Picking Up The Phone
summary: Coinbase Global Inc.  faced setbacks in its early days, so Brian Armstrong did what any startup founder would do— talk to customers to improve the product.
